indication: Confirm shunt patency after emergent TIPS for variceal hemorrhage.
findings: TIPS is patent with appropriate main shunt velocities and directional flow. No evidence of shunt thrombosis or stenosis. Reduced flow in the previously bleeding varices.
impression: Patent, functioning TIPS after emergent placement; hemorrhage controlled. (Note: a functioning portosystemic shunt can precipitate or worsen hepatic encephalopathy — relevant to her altered mental status differential.)
